description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a matte black finish and a long, heavy barrel. It features a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top for precision aiming, and a detachable box magazine located in front of the trigger guard. The stock is fixed and robust, designed for stability and comfort during long-range shooting. The rifle also includes a muzzle brake at the end of the barrel to reduce recoil. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with minimal embellishments and a focus on functionality.
description: A matte black bolt-action sniper rifle with a telescopic scope, heavy barrel, and fixed stock. It features a detachable box magazine and a muzzle brake for recoil control.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and scope aligned above the receiver.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the scope, fixed stock, detachable box magazine, trigger, and the long barrel with a muzzle brake.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the buttstock and the alignment of the scope, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with the scope, magazine, and barrel clearly visible.
